metadata.source: kayros lera BPC exact solve (HiGHS backend) — four independent runs (cold/warm starts x two labeling modes) agreeing on the value, each with exact-pricing iterations audited; recorded as a best-known solution (optimality stamping is handled separately)

optimality.prover: kayros lera branch-price-and-cut (HiGHS backend; branch m5.9-exact-stepwise-labeling, commit 272e77e)
optimality.certificate: Optimal under checker-exact route costs and standard LP/pricing tolerances. Certified by four independent solves (cold and warm starts x asymmetric and symmetric labeling modes) agreeing on the value, each with an audited exact-pricing phase and zero checker-infeasible priced columns.
optimality.arithmetic: checker-exact route costs (IEEE-754 doubles, canonical route order); the proven optimum equals compute_solution_cost of the stored routes bit-exactly
optimality.campaign: 2026-07-11/12 weekend TD re-certification top-up on Grid'5000 (reservations 6767852 + 6767861)
